sections.paragraph: Arab. سَوْطُ masc. a whip, a scourge, Pro 26:3 1Ki 12:11. שֹׁוט לָשֹׁון the scourge of a (calumniating) tongue, Job 5:21. Especially of the scourge of God, i.e. of calamities and misfortunes sent upon men by God, Isa 10:26 Job 9:23. שֹׁוט שֹׁטֵף an overflowing scourge, Isa 28:15, 18 Isa 28:18used of an overwhelming calamity (specially, a hostile host); compare Kor. Sur. lxxxviii. 12; lxxxix. 33.
